channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NYT Strands Hints and Answers for Saturday, April 25
item.description: Need help with today's NYT Strands puzzle? Extra hints and the full answer set are available to help players complete the grid and maintain their streak.

item.title: Commercial Land Mortgages Explained: How They Work and What to Know
item.description: A guide to commercial land mortgages covering how they function, key benefits, the application process, and important considerations for prospective borrowers.

item.title: 200 Judges Enrolled in AI Training Program; Experts Say More Should Follow
item.description: The Judicial AI Consortium, a free judges-only program run by three sitting judges, has attracted 200 members as AI-generated evidence increasingly appears in courtrooms.

item.title: Seven Notable Examples of Effective Social Media Marketing Campaigns
item.description: A look at seven social media marketing campaigns that illustrate how brands have used innovative strategies to engage audiences and achieve measurable results.

item.title: Anthropic Study Finds AI Raises Productivity and Job Displacement Concerns
item.description: An Anthropic study found that while AI use increases worker productivity, roughly one in five users expresses concern about potential job displacement.
